InstanceUnbindingLabel.action: Action to perform on the instance, current value: unbind
InstanceUnbindingLabel.attachRelatedResourceTag: Whether to unbind tags from associated resources (CDS system disk, data disk, EIP, snapshot, snapshot chain) simultaneously. true: unbind together; false: do not unbind together. Defaults to false if not specified
InstanceUnbindingLabel.changeTags: List of tags to be unbound, see [TagModel](BCC/API参考/附录.md#TagModel) for data format
